vlm_note: Clean 8-piece opening board (setup complete: log shows the grant then the first roll; no builds yet). Colours per meta: ThePhantom=BLACK, ValeVenga=RED. ThePhantom settlements v12, v21 (roads v12-v6, v21-v17); ValeVenga settlements v10, v5 (roads v10-v14, v5-v17). GRANT SELF-CHECK PASSES: ThePhantom's grant {BRICK:1, WHEAT:1, WOOD:1} equals exactly v12's hexes (WHEAT3+WOOD10+BRICK8) and NOT v21's (WHEAT4+WOOD10+WHEAT8); ValeVenga's grant {ORE:1, WHEAT:1, WOOD:1} equals exactly v5's hexes (WOOD11+ORE5+WHEAT4) and NOT v10's (WHEAT3+BRICK6+SHEEP4). Each grant matches EXACTLY ONE settlement, so the glyph anchor independently corroborates this localization.
